subcodes.first_line: Hearken thou to My call from the direction of the Prison, that the call of thy Lord, the All-Merciful, may draw thee to the Dawning-Place of His most beauteous Names [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان استمع ندائی عن جهه السجن لیجذبک ندآء ربک الرحمن الی مطلع اسمائه الحسنی
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @banishment to; life in 'Akka, @idle fancies; lust and passion, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
